articles.author: chandralegend
articles.description:
Hi HN,Last year we tried to bring an LLM “agent” into a real enterprise workflow. It looked easy in the demo videos. In production it was… chaos.• Tiny wording tweaks = totally different behaviour  
• Impossible to unit-test; every run was a new adventure  
• One mega-prompt meant one engineer could break the whole thing  
• SOC-2 reviewers hated the “no traceability” storyWe wanted the predictability of a backend service and the flexibility of an LLM. So we built NOMOS: a step-based state-machi

.cursorrules .claude.md windsurf_rules.md gemini.md copilot_rules.yamlIn 2025, managing separate rule files for each AI coding assistant is inefficient.ARS (AI Rules Standard) introduces a single .ai-rules file for ALL AI tools, streamlining development.https://github.com/level09/airJoin the movement to simplify and standardize AI-assisted coding.

articles.author: harshmanwani
articles.description:
Hey HN,I’ve been working on something called RemixMart — a platform that lets you generate and remix AI images using multiple models like OpenAI, Google, Flux, Stability, etc.You can remix any public image with a click, lock your own prompts for privacy, and explore creations from others.
It’s clean, community-focused, and designed for AI creators.Would love your feedback 
The site: remixmart.com
PH launch: producthunt.com/products/remix-martThanks!
– Harsh
